'''''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess''''' was the fourth story-arc in the ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' comics. It ran from [[October 1]], [[1996]] to [[February 1]], [[1997]]. [[Michael A. Stackpole]] based it on the myth of [[Wikipedia:Grand Duchess Anastasia Nikolaevna of Russia|Anastasia]].
